basic_details.job_title: JMC Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 120 Fireman, SFO and More Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Station Fire Officer, Sub Fire Officer, Leading Fireman, Fireman, Asst. Legal Officer & Labour Officer
basic_details.job_type: Municipal Corporation - Direct Recruitment (Class III & IV)
basic_details.short_information: Junagadh Mahanagarpalika (Junagadh Municipal Corporation) has released a direct recruitment notice for 120 vacancies across five Class-3 and Class-4 posts in its Fire Department and Legal wing. Eligible candidates can apply online at jumc.gujarat.gov.in from June 30, 2026 (2:00 PM) to July 20, 2026 (11:59 PM).

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 25-05-2026 Online Application Starts: 30-06-2026, from 2:00 PM Online Application Closes: 20-07-2026, till 11:59 PM Last Date for Fee Payment: 20-07-2026, till 11:59 PM

application_fee.details: The application fee amount is not mentioned in the short notice. Candidates must pay the prescribed fee online only, on or before July 20, 2026 (11:59 PM) — applications without fee payment will be automatically treated as rejected. No fee is accepted by post or in person.

qualification.details: The official short notice does not specify post-wise educational qualification, age limit, or pay scale — candidates must verify these from the detailed notification on jumc.gujarat.gov.in before applying. | Educational Qualification (General Guidance for Fire Department posts in Gujarat): | Station Fire Officer / Sub Fire Officer / Leading Fireman: candidates generally need a degree or diploma in Fire Engineering or an equivalent qualification, along with basic fire training Fireman: 10th/12th pass with basic Fire Fighting Training from a certified academy, along with physical fitness standards as per department norms Assistant Legal Officer & Labour Officer: a professional law degree (LLB) from a recognized university, with knowledge of labour laws being desirable | Age Limit: The age limit varies by post, with relaxation in the upper age limit for SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, and female candidates of Gujarat as per government norms. Exact age criteria are not stated in the short notice — check the detailed PDF for confirmed figures.

selection_process: Selection for these posts typically involves a written/competitive examination
a Physical Standard Test (PST) and Physical Efficiency Test (PET) for Fire Department posts
holds final decision-making authority over the recruitment process.
how_to_apply: Visit the official JMC website: jumc.gujarat.gov.in
Go to the Recruitment/Direct Recruitment section and locate the relevant notice
Register with a valid email ID and mobile number
Fill in personal, educational, and post-related details carefully
Upload the required documents/certificates in the prescribed format
Pay the application fee online before July 20, 2026 (11:59 PM)
Review and submit the form, and keep a printout for future reference
Note: Applications sent by post, courier, or in person will not be accepted under any circumstances.

rows.details: Station Fire Officer, Sub Fire Officer, Leading Fireman, Fireman, Asst. Legal Officer & Labour Officer
Municipal Corporation - Direct Recruitment (Class III & IV)

content_sections.heading: JMC Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Date: 25-05-2026 Online Application Starts: 30-06-2026, from 2:00 PM Online Application Closes: 20-07-2026, till 11:59 PM Last Date for Fee Payment: 20-07-2026, till 11:59 PM

content_sections.heading: JMC Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: JMC has announced a total of 120 posts, distributed across five categories as follows:

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for JMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The official short notice does not specify post-wise educational qualification, age limit, or pay scale — candidates must verify these from the detailed notification on jumc.gujarat.gov.in before applying. Educational Qualification (General Guidance for Fire Department posts in Gujarat): Station Fire Officer / Sub Fire Officer / Leading Fireman: candidates generally need a degree or diploma in Fire Engineering or an equivalent qualification, along with basic fire training Fireman: 10th/12th pass with basic Fire Fighting Training from a certified academy, along with physical fitness standards as per department norms Assistant Legal Officer & Labour Officer: a professional law degree (LLB) from a recognized university, with knowledge of labour laws being desirable Age Limit: The age limit varies by post, with relaxation in the upper age limit for SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, and female candidates of Gujarat as per government norms. Exact age criteria are not stated in the short notice — check the detailed PDF for confirmed figures.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee for JMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee amount is not mentioned in the short notice. Candidates must pay the prescribed fee online only, on or before July 20, 2026 (11:59 PM) — applications without fee payment will be automatically treated as rejected. No fee is accepted by post or in person.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process for JMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for these posts typically involves a written/competitive examination, a Physical Standard Test (PST) and Physical Efficiency Test (PET) for Fire Department posts, and document verification. The Commissioner, Junagadh Mahanagarpalika, holds final decision-making authority over the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for JMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official JMC website: jumc.gujarat.gov.in Go to the Recruitment/Direct Recruitment section and locate the relevant notice Register with a valid email ID and mobile number Fill in personal, educational, and post-related details carefully Upload the required documents/certificates in the prescribed format Pay the application fee online before July 20, 2026 (11:59 PM) Review and submit the form, and keep a printout for future reference Note: Applications sent by post, courier, or in person will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in JMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 120 vacancies in total - Station Fire Officer (13), Sub Fire Officer (13), Leading Fireman (12), Fireman (80), and Assistant Legal Officer & Labour Officer (2).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for JMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online and pay the fee is July 20, 2026, till 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q3. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: Online registration started on June 30, 2026, from 2:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for JMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only online applications through jumc.gujarat.gov.in are accepted; postal or in-person applications are rejected.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I check the detailed eligibility and pay scale for JMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: On the official website, jumc.gujarat.gov.in, under the detailed recruitment notification.
